categories.label: Fame Track
categories.description: Fame accumulated on the score track during the game from tiles and Publicity actions

categories.label: Filled Casino Section
categories.description: 5 Fame if the yellow casino section is completely filled with yellow and/or green tiles

categories.label: Filled Hotel Section
categories.description: 5 Fame if the blue hotel section is completely filled with blue and/or green tiles

categories.label: Connected Hotel-Casino
categories.description: 3 Fame if an uninterrupted path connects your casino entrance to your hotel entrance

categories.label: Highest Population Bonus
categories.description: 1st place: 5 Fame, 2nd: 3 Fame, 3rd: 1 Fame (ties split and round down)

categories.label: Highest Revenue Bonus
categories.description: 1st place: 5 Fame, 2nd: 3 Fame, 3rd: 1 Fame (ties split and round down)

categories.label: Cash Bonus
categories.description: 1 Fame for each full $10 in cash at end of game

categories.label: Three-Quarter Diamonds
categories.description: 1 Fame for each three-quarter diamond shape formed by theme bonus symbols

categories.label: Full Diamonds
categories.description: 3 Fame for each full diamond shape formed by theme bonus symbols
